missionStatement: The San Luis Obispo High School Athletics Hall of Fame seeks to fulfill an enduring legacy of honoring excellence among our athletic alumni, coaches, and contributors — recognizing those whose accomplishments on and off the field embody the Tiger spirit.

athlete: Nominee must have graduated at least ten years prior to the year of induction.
Nominee must have participated in sports at SLOHS for more than one year.
Accomplishments at SLOHS and beyond must align with the Hall of Fame mission.
A complete nomination form must be submitted on the SLOHS HOF website.
coach: Coach nominee must have coached at SLOHS for a minimum of ten years (not necessarily consecutive).
Accomplishments at SLOHS and beyond must align with the Hall of Fame mission.

ceremony.title: Class of 2026 Induction
ceremony.venueDetail: The annual SLOTAB Booster Bash — where this year's Hall of Fame class is officially inducted.

alumniMembership.title: Become an Alumni Member
alumniMembership.blurb: Former SLOHS Tigers can now support the next generation of athletes through a dedicated Alumni Membership tier. Alumni Members receive recognition at the Booster Bash, an invitation to the Hall of Fame induction, and updates on every Tiger team all year long.
